 {"id":"bd-qqc.9","title":"Update Homebrew formula","description":"Update the Homebrew tap with new version:

```bash
./scripts/update-homebrew.sh {{version}}
```

This script waits for GitHub Actions to complete (~5 min), then updates the formula with new SHA256 hashes.

After running, verify the formula with:

```bash
brew info steveyegge/beads/bd
```","status":"tombstone","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-18T22:42:35.815096-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-24T16:25:30.525596-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-qqc.9","depends_on_id":"bd-qqc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-18T22:42:35.816752-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-qqc.9","depends_on_id":"bd-qqc.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-18T22:43:21.332955-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}],"deleted_at":"2025-12-24T16:25:30.525596-08:00","deleted_by":"daemon","delete_reason":"delete","original_type":"task"}
 {"id":"bd-qqvw","title":"Vendor and integrate beads-merge tool","description":"Incorporate @neongreen's beads-merge 3-way merge tool into bd to solve:
- Multi-workspace deletion sync (bd-hv01)
- Git merge conflicts in JSONL
- Field-level intelligent merging

**Repository**: https://github.com/neongreen/mono/tree/main/beads-merge

**Integration approach**: Vendor the Go code with attribution, pending @neongreen's approval (GitHub issue #240)

**Benefits**:
- Prevents deletion resurrection bug
- Smart dependency merging (union + dedup)
- Timestamp handling (max wins)
- Detects deleted-vs-modified conflicts
- Works as git merge driver

**Acceptance criteria**:
- beads-merge code vendored into bd codebase
- Available as `bd merge` command
- Git merge driver setup during `bd init`
- Tests verify 3-way merge logic
- Documentation updated
- @neongreen credited","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-11-05T18:41:59.500359-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-06T18:19:16.234208-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-06T15:40:24.796921-08:00"}

 {"id":"bd-qs4p","title":"bd import fails on duplicate external_ref with no resolution options","description":"When JSONL contains duplicate external_ref values (e.g., two issues both have external_ref='BS-170'), bd import fails entirely with no resolution options.

User must manually edit JSONL to remove duplicates, which is error-prone.

Example error:
```
batch import contains duplicate external_ref values:
external_ref 'BS-170' appears in issues: [opal-39 opal-43]
```

Should handle this similar to duplicate issue detection - offer to merge, pick one, or clear duplicates.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-11-06T10:53:41.906165-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-06T11:03:16.975041-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-06T11:03:16.975041-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-qsbn","title":"swarm status: Handle external dependencies and error cases","description":"Three issues: (1) Silent error swallowing - GetDependencyRecords errors are silently continued, but analyzeEpicForSwarm returns errors. Inconsistent. (2) External dependencies ignored - if issue depends on something outside epic thats still open, we mark it Ready incorrectly. (3) Command usage string says [epic-id] (optional) but requires exactly 1 arg. File: cmd/bd/swarm.go","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-28T21:31:08.574846-08:00","created_by":"beads/crew/emma","updated_at":"2025-12-30T15:44:43.363959-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T00:36:28.565331-08:00","close_reason":"Fixed all three issues: (1) Made error handling consistent - analyzeEpicForSwarm now adds warnings for GetDependencyRecords failures instead of returning errors. (2) External dependencies now checked in getSwarmStatus - open external deps block issues. (3) Usage strings fixed to use <epic-id> instead of [epic-id] for required arguments."}
